content.en:
This kind of blue crystal is simply an unimaginable treasure for Ye Tian, and there seem to be quite a few here.

With these blue crystals alone, he had the hope of elevating his cultivation to the peak realm of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor.

"Let's practice here first!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian used these blue crystals to cultivate.

With the passage of time, his cultivation continued to improve, his life level continued to improve, and his physical body became stronger and stronger.

This kind of cultivation speed is simply incomparable to the outside world, and at this speed, he only needs a few hundred billion Origin Domain Eras, and I am afraid that he will have the hope of advancing to the peak realm of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of billions of primordial era years have passed.

"Finally reached the peak realm of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Being able to cultivate to the peak realm of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor so quickly was really beyond his expectations.

At present, his cultivation has reached the limit of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and one step further is the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm.

If you want to advance from the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor to the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm, it will take even longer.

Ye Tian would not consider impacting the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm at the moment, but he could still cultivate in the Interception Source Sea, improve his life level, and even refine his physical body, as well as improve his immeasurable will.

"Let's get out of here first and go to the other parts of the Source Sea to find resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He knew that his duplicate body would never be able to get out of the Truncated Source Sea, so he would not collect these blue crystals, so he left directly.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to look for various resources, resources that could improve his cultivation, he couldn't look at it, although it was a pity to discard it, but there was no way to get out, so he could only choose this.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found a treasure that could greatly improve his will.

It was a kind of black liquor, which could be integrated into the immeasurable will, so as to continuously refine the immeasurable will, and one drop of black liquor was enough to increase Ye Tian's immeasurable will by 0.01, which was already a very exaggerated increase.

Of course, this is the current increase, and if the black liquor is refined too much, the effect will definitely get worse and worse.

"There's a lot of black liquid in this area, so let's practice here first!"

Ye Tian began to practice in retreat in this area, refining drops of this special black liquid.

Immediately, his immeasurable will began to slowly improve.

Previously, his immeasurable will had been raised to the level of 3.3 scales, but at this moment, with the help of black liquor, his immeasurable will gradually began to reach the level of 4 scales.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's immeasurable will gradually increased to the level of 5 scales.

At this time, the black liquid in this area was consumed by him.

"Gotta go somewhere else!"

Ye Tian slowly sneaked around, and finally found more black liquid in another area.

So, he continued to practice in this area to improve his immeasurable will.

Subsequently, he consumed all the black liquor in this area, raising his immeasurable will to 7.5 scales.

180 billion years after the Primordial Era.

"Immeasurable Will has reached 15.8 scale!"

Ye Tian said very excitedly.

Now, his immeasurable will has reached beyond the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, who has just broken through and has been stable!

After all, if the ordinary Ninefold Ancestor has just broken through, the immeasurable will will only be three scales, and the stable realm can only be improved to 10 scales after a period of cultivation!

But now, his immeasurable will has reached 15.8 scale, which is already a little higher, but much higher.

However, at his current level of immeasurable will, a drop of black liquid was of little use in improving immeasurable will.

This is not that the black liquor is not of high grade, but that his cultivation is limited.

If a Ninefold Ancestor came here and cultivated with these black liquids, the increase in the immeasurable will would definitely be very high, and even if the immeasurable will reached hundreds of scales, refining the black liquid would still have an effect.

However, Ye Tian's cultivation was only at the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, so his cultivation restrained his immeasurable will, and being able to raise it to 15.8 scale was already a black liquor effect against the sky.

"Next, even if you refine a large amount of black liquor, the maximum increase you can make is 1 scale, which doesn't make much sense!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He decided that if he had cultivated to the Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm, he would have to come here to cultivate.

If he could, he was even going to seal a replica body here.

In this way, if he cultivated to break through to the Ninefold Origin Ancestor in the future, he could directly copy the Ninefold Origin Ancestor-level copy body here.

"Next, you can find treasures that can increase your life!"

Ye Tian decided.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully find a red algae plant, and devouring this plant could improve his life level.

As a result, Ye Tian's life level also began to improve.

Originally, his life level could have been raised to a level close to 70, but now with the help of this algae plant, his life level has been continuously improved, and he soon surpassed 70 or more.

After a long time, Ye Tian raised his life level to more than 80.

However, after 80, it is too difficult to improve the life level, which is also restricted by cultivation, which makes it difficult to improve the life level.

"Immeasurable will 15.8 scale, life level 81, the physical body is constantly refined, and it has almost reached the limit, I am now almost unable to enter the peak realm of the Eightfold Ancestor!"

Ye Tian knew that there was no need for him to continue to stay in the Eightfold Origin Ancestor Realm, that was meaningless, he needed to impact the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor Realm.

It is still very difficult to impact the half-step ninefold Origin Ancestor realm from the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, first of all, it is necessary to fuse the Life Dao Flower and the Yuan Dao Dao Flower.

You must reach a three-percent fusion degree before you can break the shackles and advance to the half-step nine-fold ancestor realm, if you reach a ten-percent fusion degree, you are qualified to impact the nine-fold ancestor.

It's just eligibility, but the success rate depends on the foundation.

For example, those Dao Ancestors who only have the Eightfold Yuan Dao Flower and the Eightfold Life Dao Flower, if they want to achieve the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, the probability is almost none!

Of course, it is not without a little hope, if there are enough precious resources, it is still possible to forcibly let a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor with insufficient potential advance to become a Ninefold Origin Ancestor.

But that kind of resource is too rare and precious, enough for forces like the Nine Stories Building to fight for it.
